mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ntc_notice (title, content, content_html, publisher_id, is_top, scheduled_time, attachment, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{contentHtml}, #{publisherId}, #{isTop}, #{scheduledTime}, #{attachment}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE ntc_notice SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, content_html=#{contentHtml}, is_top=#{isTop}, scheduled_time=#{scheduledTime}, attachment=#{attachment}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, content_html, publisher_id, is_top, scheduled_time, attachment, status, create_time, update_time FROM ntc_notice WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ntc_notice WHERE status = 1
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO ntc_notice_read (notice_id, user_id) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ntc_notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
SELECT user_id FROM ntc_notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}

SELECT id, title, content, content_html, publisher_id, is_top, scheduled_time, attachment, status, create_time, update_time FROM ntc_notice WHERE status = 0 AND scheduled_time IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_time <= NOW()

SELECT u.id, u.real_name AS realName, u.username, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM ntc_notice_read r JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE r.notice_id = #{noticeId} ORDER BY r.read_time ASC

SELECT u.id, u.real_name AS realName, u.username, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.id NOT IN ( SELECT user_id FROM ntc_notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} ) ORDER BY d.dept_name, u.real_name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1
